name: Hearty Egg Scramble
recipeIngredient: 2 medium Potatoes, peeled, cooked and diced
recipeInstructions:
Hearty Egg Scramble is a filling and flavorful dish. The ham and potatoes are comforting additions.
The cost for this dish is estimated at $.94 per serving.
In a large skillet, cook onion and green pepper in butter until crisp-tender.
Add potatoes and ham; cook and stir for 5 minutes.
In a bowl, beat eggs, water, and pepper; pour over ham mixture.
Cook over low heat, stirring constantly, until eggs are set.
